case_title: ABLE CREDIT SERVICES vs. BREWSTER, ESTELLA et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABLE CREDIT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BREWSTER, ESTELLA BREWSTER, CLAUDE
